sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61574, Lot 24003 — Ancients
PHRYGIA. Julia. Nero (AD 54-68). AE (17mm, 3.04 gm, 11h). NGC Choice AU 4/5 - 5/5.  Ca. AD 55, Sergius Hephaistion, magistrate. ΝΕΡΩΝ-ΚΑΙΣΑΡ, bare-headed, draped bust of Nero right / ΣΕΡΓΙΟΣ
sales.description:
Ancients
PHRYGIA. Julia. Nero (AD 54-68). AE (17mm, 3.04 gm, 11h). NGC Choice AU 4/5 - 5/5.  Ca. AD 55, Sergius Hephaistion, magistrate. ΝΕΡΩΝ-ΚΑΙΣΑΡ, bare-headed, draped bust of Nero right / ΣΕΡΓΙΟΣ ΗΦΑΙΣΤΙΩΝ Ι-ΟΥ ΛΙΕΩΝ, Mên on horseback advancing right, reins in right hand, spear over left shoulder. RPC I 3191.

Ex Heritage Auctions, Auction 61379 (27 May 2024), lot 24034. 

Nero, born Lucius Domitius Ahenobarbus in 37 AD, ascended to the Roman imperial throne in 54 AD, initiating a tumultuo...
